name: coach-buddy
description: Thinking partner for Agile coaches — install into Claude Code, Cursor, or use in a Claude Chat Project

scripts.build:plugin: PLUGIN_BUILD_DIR=$TMPDIR/coach-buddy-plugin-build node scripts/sync-skills.js && mkdir -p $TMPDIR/coach-buddy-plugin-build/.claude-plugin && cp plugin/plugin.json $TMPDIR/coach-buddy-plugin-build/.claude-plugin/plugin.json && PLUGIN_BUILD_DIR=$TMPDIR/coach-buddy-plugin-build node scripts/validate-plugin.js && rm -f $TMPDIR/coach-buddy.plugin && (cd $TMPDIR/coach-buddy-plugin-build && zip -r $TMPDIR/coach-buddy.plugin . -x '*.DS_Store') && cp $TMPDIR/coach-buddy.plugin coach-buddy.plugin && echo 'coach-buddy.plugin ready'
scripts.build:plugin:ci: PLUGIN_BUILD_DIR=/tmp/coach-buddy-plugin-build node scripts/sync-skills.js && mkdir -p /tmp/coach-buddy-plugin-build/.claude-plugin && cp plugin/plugin.json /tmp/coach-buddy-plugin-build/.claude-plugin/plugin.json && PLUGIN_BUILD_DIR=/tmp/coach-buddy-plugin-build node scripts/validate-plugin.js && rm -f /tmp/coach-buddy.plugin && (cd /tmp/coach-buddy-plugin-build && zip -r /tmp/coach-buddy.plugin . -x '*.DS_Store') && cp /tmp/coach-buddy.plugin coach-buddy.plugin && echo 'coach-buddy.plugin ready'
